mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) AS totalTripCount,
(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.sido_name) FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId}) AS visitedRegionCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'COMPLETED') AS completedTripCount,
(SELECT NVL(AVG(end_date - start_date + 1), 0) FROM trip WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) AS avgTripDays FROM dual
SELECT DISTINCT r.sido_name FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT DISTINCT r.sido_name FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} AND cm.trip_place_id IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conquest_map (member_id, region_id, conquest_date) SELECT #{memberId}, r.region_id, SYSDATE FROM region r WHERE r.sido_name = #{sidoName} AND r.api_sigungu_code IS NULL AND ROWNUM = 1
